The '''''Bargain Hunter''''' was a [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]] owned by [[Dubrak Qennto]] and crewed by [[Maris Ferasi]] and [[Jorj Car'das]]. It was able to go for between 600 and 650 [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]] at sublight before needing to refuel, and it was equipped with [[Laser/Legends|lasers]] and [[Missile/Legends|missiles]]. [[Progga]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] chased the ''Hunter'' and its crew into the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]] because he wanted the cargo that they were taking to [[Drixo]] the Hutt. [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] of the [[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss Ascendancy]] intercepted them with three fighters and the ''[[Springhawk/Legends|Springhawk]]''. He destroyed [[Progga's starship]] in a 6 [[Standard minute/Legends|minute]] [[Skirmish between Progga and Picket Force Two|skirmish]], after disabling the ''Bargain Hunter'' with a ship-sized [[conner net]].
